goal: Add a v0 release readiness verifier that audits the user's full objective against current SSOT-backed evidence: final program development readiness, FE v6 application, and the remaining M6 real trained adapter no-fake endpoint blocker. The verifier must not claim release GO unless current evidence proves every required gate, and current environment is expected to remain NOT_GO because real trained CUDA lora_adapter endpoint evidence is absent.
head: cf2fdf5
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming v0 release or M6-RC GO before live structured no-fake endpoint evidence exists
Weakening FE v6 or M6 release evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a release-readiness audit script, focused tests, generated review evidence, WORKING.md updates, and this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Verifier confirms FE v6 evidence and desktop route repair evidence are present
Verifier consumes current M6-RC evidence verification and real adapter prereq audit
Verifier reports NOT_GO with only the real trained adapter no-fake endpoint blocker for current release readiness
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate adds audit tooling only and does not generate a trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped v0 release readiness audit gate after SSOT review showed final completion is unproven without M6 real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence.
phase_notes.audit: Read docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, SSOT M3/M6/Milestone KPI sections, current M6 verifier output, and real adapter prereq audit. Confirmed FE v6 and desktop e2e route evidence exist, while final release remains unproven because M6-RC verifier reports real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint and prereq audit is NOT_READY.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/verify_v0_release_readiness.py to audit FE v6 application, desktop route repair evidence, M6-RC evidence verification, and real adapter prereq diagnostics together. Added focused tests and generated artifacts/review/v0_release_readiness_audit.json plus markdown evidence. No runtime/backend/schema/training/export/UI behavior changed.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused pytest, v0 release readiness verifier expected NOT_GO, generated JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: v0 release readiness audit tooling is complete. Current release readiness is NOT_GO with only real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the release blocker; unexpected_blockers is empty.

pabcd.approved_scope: Release readiness audit script, focused tests, generated evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
